---
name: 🐛 Site bug
about: Report something broken on the wiki website (layout, links, search, rendering)
title: "[Site Bug] "
labels: ["bug", "site"]
assignees: []
---

## What happened?

A clear description of what's broken. If it's a typo or wrong text, quote the
exact text and the page it appears on.

## Page URL

The full URL of the page where the bug occurred, e.g.
`https://monomyth.aureus.me/docs/game-systems/weapons`

## Steps to reproduce

1.
2.
3.

## Expected vs. actual

- **Expected:** What you thought would happen.
- **Actual:** What happened instead.

## Screenshots

If applicable, attach screenshots showing the problem.

## Environment

- **Browser & version:** e.g. Firefox 127, Chrome 126, Safari 17
- **Device / OS:** e.g. Windows 11 desktop, iPhone 14 (iOS 17), iPad
- **Screen size:** e.g. 1920×1080, 1440px wide, mobile portrait
- Did the issue appear on the live site or a local preview? (live / local)

## Additional context

Anything else relevant — console errors, network failures, whether it's
reproducible every time, etc.
